description_long: This is a tall, freestanding wooden cabinet with a distressed blue finish, featuring two large hinged doors that open to reveal a spacious, empty interior divided vertically. Below the main compartment are three drawers, two smaller ones side by side and a larger one beneath, all equipped with brass handles. The cabinet's exterior shows signs of wear, giving it a vintage or rustic appearance, while the interior is lined with a darker, textured material. The side views reveal the thickness of the doors and the depth of the drawers, as well as the substantial molding at the top and base. The back is plain and unadorned, matching the blue finish of the rest of the cabinet. Brass handles are present on both the doors and drawers, adding a touch of classic style.
description: A tall, vintage blue wooden cabinet with two large doors, three drawers, and brass handles, featuring a distressed finish and a spacious, divided interior.
description_view_0: Front view showing both doors open, revealing the empty interior and all three drawers partially open.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the cabinet's depth, the thickness of the doors, and the side profile of the drawers and handles.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, unadorned blue back panel with no visible openings or hardware.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the door and drawers from the opposite angle, with visible brass handle details.
